subject: fix(audit): resolve 13 code quality issues from audit sweep
body:
Race conditions, memory leaks, math errors, and validation gaps
identified by the `audit` trigger. All fixes are minimal and targeted.

Critical: RAF leak (useDialogA11y), HMR interval leak (usePWAUpdate)
High: cosine div-by-zero, waitForModel interval leak, hardcoded indices,
      FileReader lifecycle leak
Medium: non-null assertion, confidence div-by-zero, diagnostic timeout
        noise, silent DB failure logging
Low: NaN guard in Holt init, full-scan import validation, timeout
     cleanup pattern consistency

Tags: audit, race-condition, memory-leak, math, validation, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EDm1yAUNe71KZC2BSvCMV4
title: resolve 13 code quality issues from audit sweep
